docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY ELLISON, HAROLD AS TO DEFENDANT FURSTENBERG, BENJAMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLISON, HAROLD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FURSTENBERG, BENJAMIN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
